risk_verdict.rationale: Account Acme Micro represents low financial exposure (ARR $1,200) and ticket contains standard support request with no churn threat.
risk_verdict.recommended_action: Handle ticket through standard customer support workflow. No escalation required.

risk_verdict.rationale: High revenue account (MegaCorp Inc., ARR $250,000) is within imminent renewal window (12 days) and exhibiting explicit dissatisfaction or churn indicators.
risk_verdict.recommended_action: Escalate immediately to Account Manager Tony Stark (am.tony@revenueprotector.com). Conduct a wellness review and offer renewal concessions.

risk_verdict.rationale: Client MicroScale Net displays a high level of frustration (score 100/100), but has a smaller contract value ($2,500) or a distant renewal date (180 days).
risk_verdict.recommended_action: Assign to support queue with high priority. Log on watchlist and address the technical or billing complaint promptly to prevent escalation.
